Who I Am

About Me

I'm a Machine Learning researcher and software engineer based in Kolkata, India, currently pursuing my M.Tech in IT (Courseware Engineering) at the prestigious Jadavpur University — where my research is focused on deep learning, attention mechanisms, and intelligent systems.

My core interests lie at the intersection of Artificial Intelligence, Deep Learning, Computer Vision, and Natural Language Processing. I actively explore fine-grained image classification, neural network architectures (including ResNet with attention), and data-driven solutions through hands-on research projects and experimentation.

I also bring real-world software engineering experience from ORI Technology Pvt Ltd and Micronix System Pvt Ltd, which sharpens my ability to bridge research and production-ready systems. Outside the lab, you'll find me travelling, bike riding, or volunteering for blood donation drives.
